programme.title: Supermarket Sweep
programme.desc: Teams answer questions to earn time and advantages over their competitors before going on a supermarket shopping spree; the team that adds the most valuable items to its cart wins.

programme.title: Get to the Heart: The Barbara Mandrell Story
programme.desc: This compelling portrait of country music star Barbara Mandrell looks at her early career, the car accident in 1984 that almost killed her and her ultimate recovery.

programme.title: High Lonesome - The Story Of Bluegrass Music
programme.desc: Night Flight Presents: High Lonesome traces the music and sounds from its Appalachian roots to the present. The rise; fall; and consistent revival of bluegrass chronicled through oral history and visual record.

programme.title: Hip Hop Don't Stop
programme.desc: This film gives us the definitive chronicle of hip-hop from its beginnings. See the evolution of music with vintage footage, live performances, and exclusive interviews with hip hop legends

programme.title: Justin Bieber's Believe
programme.desc: BELIEVE is an intimate look at Justin Bieber's world tour with his hits and a backstage tour. The underdog who dreamt of playing at Madison Square Garden to the world's biggest pop star.

programme.title: Loving Elvis
programme.desc: Elvis’s meteoric rise to fame in the 1950s is recounted by the women he was dating at the time, revealing a mama’s boy who never recovered from his mother’s sudden death, at the height of his career.

programme.title: Elvis Home Movies
programme.desc: This film features what is believed to be the oldest known home movie footage of Elvis Presley to date.

programme.title: Best of Michael Bolton Live
programme.desc: Bringing down the house in his first concert release, Michael Bolton is the Grammy-winning music giant with more than 40 million records sold and the recipient of five "Million Performance Song Awards".

programme.title: Liam Gallagher: As It Was
programme.desc: This documentary follows British singer Liam Gallagher as he attempts to make a solo comeback.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: This beautiful lake in the glen will leave you fully rested and at peace with the world; Bob Ross creates a quiet mountain masterpiece.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross takes you on a journey through the majestic forest where you can smell the sweet aroma of pines and taste cool mist in the air.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Follow the old dirt road to that quaint country barn nestled in nature's greenery - Bob Ross paints your destination today.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Nicholas Hankins: Bob Ross' Unfinished Season
programme.desc: Nicholas Hankins recalls memories of summers past in this scene originally painted on July 4, 1995.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Nicholas Hankins: Bob Ross' Unfinished Season
programme.desc: The colorful Milky Way is the backdrop for striking silhouettes of happy little Bob Ross trees in this night scene.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Gently rolling mountains make an amazing backdrop for this Bob Ross masterpiece; a winding stream and textured ground vegetation provide the rest.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Travel down an abandoned road with Bob Ross and stumble upon an old weathered barn that has seen better days - what dreams are made of.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross begins with a black canvas to create this startling rendition of a snowy landscape with the notorious lights of the northern sky.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: In this oval painting, Bob Ross creates a wonderful scene where an old fence follows a trail to the edge of the woods.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bundle up and endure the cold weater in this snow filled adventure; Bob Ross paints a wintry mountain scene using only Grey and White tones.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Guest Artist Dan Jester shares with us the beauty of sweet lavender clusters nestled in the heart of a snowy winter forest.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Take a drive into the country with Bob Ross and pass through an old covered bridge into a landscape bursting with soft fall foliage.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Visiting artist, Ben Stahl, uses a more traditional painting method to bring out the coy loveliness of a little girl.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross creates a breathtaking, misty wooded scene with tiny trickling creek that's fast and easy to recreate.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross' dramatic use of blue tones results in an emotional depiction of stark waves at night - all tucked inside an oval shape.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Enjoy this Bob Ross scene that includes luxurious green foliage and an old weathered trestle-bridge placed lovingly amongst all the beauty.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: See the amazing glacier-like peaks Bob Ross creates in this icy panorama; grab your painting knife and do this one too.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Travel with Bob Ross and enjoy a spectacular view -- this painting presents a fabulous lesson in creating rugged and rocky natural surfaces.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross creates an oval scene with warm brown and gold tones that captures the essence of a lonely forest river.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Guest artist Dana Jester creates a Bob Ross-style mountain scene with dignified foothills and evergreens, and super vibrant bushes.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A weathered fence guards a rustic country home shadowed by tall trees as Bob Ross creates another masterpiece in his unique style.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: So quickly, Bob Ross paints this beautiful and peaceful mountain valley - so many layers and layers on the canvas.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Team up with Bob Ross and travel back to the days of swimming in that lovely secluded river bend; bring back memories of a forgotten time.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bundle up with Bob Ross when you visit this towering ice mountain as it protects the misty falls and chilly lake in the valley.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Visit a lovely mountain setting with Bob Ross, complete with leafy trees and evergreens, and step into a secluded fishing spot just perfect for casting a line.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bundle up with Bob Ross and visit the north in the middle of winter! Snow and ice abound in a profusion of beauty.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: On a clear day, Bob Ross creates an almighty mountain captured by a clear blue sky - another spectacular masterpiece on canvas.

programme.desc: John Pemberton invents Coca-Cola from wine and cocaine, the FBI tries to take down Martin Luther King Jr., and Stetson Kennedy infiltrates the Ku Klux Klan. Guest starring Bill Hader, Simon Helberg, Kevin Nealon and more.

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: Patty Hearst gets kidnapped and brainwashed, Mark Twain flees the city in fear and finds his unlikely first hit story. Guest starring Kristen Wiig, Terry Crews, Lisa Bonet and more.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: Outlaw (of Gor)
programme.desc: A hero and loser friend are transplanted to the planet of Gor by mysterious forces and are soon caught up in an evil sorcerer's plot of dastardly evil.

programme.title: MST3K: Cry Wilderness
programme.desc: Follows the adventures of a young boy, Paul Cooper, who gets a vision from old pal Bigfoot while he's at boarding school.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: The Rebel Set
programme.desc: Three coffee shop customers help an owner rob an armored car.

programme.title: MST3K: Lords Of The Deep
programme.desc: In part three of a Gauntlet six-movie binge, Jonah and the bots take on the 1989 film Lords of the Deep.

programme.title: MST3K: The Magic Voyage Of Sinbad (Sadko)
programme.desc: An adventurer sets sail in search of the bird of happiness in Sadko (1953).

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: The Human Duplicators
programme.desc: An alien takes over a professor's mansion-basement laboratory, and makes android clones to infiltrate the government.

programme.title: MST3K: The Day Time Ended
programme.desc: In part four of a Gauntlet six-movie binge, Jonah and the bots take on the 1979 film The Day Time Ended.

programme.title: MST3K: Radar Secret Service
programme.desc: Mike and the bots learn the art of safe driving and why you should pay attention at railroad crossings in the 1959 short, Last Clear Chance. Later, they watch government agents use radar technology to catch criminals in Radar Secret Service.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Walker's partner goes undercover and gets sent to prison. But the bus never makes it when a hurricane blows into Texas and Walker follows the escapees to a remote hotel where only the owners and a special friend still remain.

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: When fellow workers at a labor camp nickname Richard Kimble Doc it prompts three criminals, who have kidnapped a boy, to draft him into service when the boy is hurt.

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Richard Kimble is forced to defy hurricane warnings to transport a couple from the mainland to the Florida Keys.

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Richard Kimble happens to be in the background when a sidewalk photographer snaps some newlyweds and it leads to concentrated trouble.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver inherits a vintage car and a whole lot of trouble when his grandfather passes away.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver travels to East Berlin in search of a friend’s lost granddaughter.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: After testifying against him in his bid for freedom, MacGyver becomes the target of an escaped mass murderer.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: While out on his morning jog, Jesse unsuccessfully attempts to save a man who has locked himself in his gargage with the engine running, an apparent suicide.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: After Madison hears that Lisa, a personal friend and one of her star students, has missed a few classes, she visits her and finds Lisa comatose from a drug overdose.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: It's a case of mistaken identity when Greg, a mobster who looks just like Mark, is released from prison and moves into Mark's neighborhood.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Jesse operates and removed the bullet from Greg, thinking he is Mark. But everything starts to unfold when mark show up for his shift at the hospital.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Mark's patient and shock-jock radio talk show host Denise announces her nation-wide search for her birth mother and jokes that she'll kill her if she doesn't want anything to do with her.

programme.title: Twin Peaks
programme.desc: Albert determines that neither Leo nor Jacques killed Laura, but he is unable find any leads into who shot Cooper. Cooper says they must find the third man, who he believes to be Bob, the gray-haired man.

programme.title: Twin Peaks
programme.desc: Ronette is attacked in her hospital bed by an unseen person. Jean Renault, brother of Jacques and Bernard, plans to blackmail Ben Horne for the release of Audrey. Donna meets with Harold Smith, a shut-in who had befriended Laura.

programme.title: Gone In 60 Seconds
programme.desc: Buckle-up as Eleanor, the fast and furious Ford Fastback Mustang, takes you on a full-throttle ride you'll never forget. The Assignment: To steal 48 muscle and exotic cars! The Challenge: Avoid getting caught!

programme.title: Escape from Alcatraz
programme.desc: Superstar Clint Eastwood and director Don Siegel re-team for their fifth film in this fascinating account of the only three men ever to escape from the infamous maximum security prison at Alcatraz.

programme.title: The Mechanic
programme.desc: In a role that powered him to stardom, Charles Bronson is an underworld executioner who turns murder into an art form in this ultimate crime chiller.

programme.title: Mr. Majestyk
programme.desc: Charles Bronson stars as an ex-con and Vietnam vet whose efforts to run a straight business soon have him locking horns with both the law and the mafia in this explosive tale of backwoods revenge.

programme.title: Death Wish
programme.desc: In this explosive story of revenge and urban violence, Charles Bronson plays Paul Kersey, a bleeding-heart liberal who has a change of opinion after his wife and daughter are violently attacked by a gang of thugs in their apartment.

programme.title: Rolling Thunder
programme.desc: William Devane and Tommy Lee Jones star as two former P.O.W.s out for revenge in this neo-noir action-thriller that Quentin Tarantino cites as one of his favorite films. Written by genre masters Paul Schrader and Heywood Gould. John Flynn directs.

programme.title: Joe (1970)
programme.desc: Anti-hippie Joe (Peter Boyle) finds a kindred spirit in Bill Compton (Dennis Patrick) who boasts that he killed a drug-dealing hippie (Patrick McDermott). When a news report confirms the incident, vigilante justice is set in motion.

programme.title: The Taking of Pelham One Two Three (1974)
programme.desc: A gang hijacks a subway train and threaten to kill the hostages one by one until their demands are met. Forced to stall, transit chief Lt. Garber (Walter Matthau) must outmaneuver one of the craftiest and cruelest screen villains (Robert Shaw) ever.

programme.title: Rambo III
programme.desc: Rambo refuses to join his friend and former mentor, Colonel Trautman, on a mission to Afghanistan. The mission fails and Trautman is captured by Russian troops. Now Rambo must infiltrate the Russian fortress to save his only friend.

programme.title: First Blood
programme.desc: A soft-spoken Vietnam vet drifts into a small town looking for no trouble, but finds it in the form of a psychotic local sheriff who finds pleasure in hating him for no reason.

programme.title: Rambo: First Blood Part II
programme.desc: John Rambo is sent on assignment back to Southeast Asia to uncover evidence of still missing POWs, and ends up with his hands full when he comes up against Vietnamese soldiers still guarding the camps.

programme.title: Rambo III
programme.desc: Rambo refuses to join his friend and former mentor, Colonel Trautman, on a mission to Afghanistan. The mission fails and Trautman is captured by Russian troops. Now Rambo must infiltrate the Russian fortress to save his only friend.

programme.title: Top Gun
programme.desc: Tom Cruise is superb as Maverick Mitchell, a young flyer who's out to become the best. And Kelly McGillis plays the instructor who teaches Maverick a few things you can't learn in a classroom.

programme.title: Witness
programme.desc: When a young Amish woman and her son get caught up in the murder of an undercover narcotic's agent, their saviour turns out to be hardened Philadelphia detective John Book.

programme.title: Next of Kin
programme.desc: When policeman Truman Gates' younger brother is murdered by the mob, Gates is torn between his desire to uphold the law and his lust for revenge. But Gates' older brother will not be satisfied until every member of the Chicago mob is dead.

programme.title: Cop Land
programme.desc: Director James Mangold (FORD vs FERRARI) extends his crime thriller classic that brings together a powerhouse cast, including Robert De Niro, Sylvester Stallone, Ray Liotta, and Harvey Keitel.

programme.title: Cliffhanger
programme.desc: This gripping action-adventure tale features Sylvester Stallone as a member of the Rocky Mountain Rescue Team, still grieving over his inability to prevent a friend from falling to her death.

programme.title: Thelma & Louise
programme.desc: In one of the greatest road movies of all time, Geena Davis and Susan Sarandon ride to everlasting fame as two women who embark on a crime spree across the American southwest.

programme.title: The People vs. Larry Flynt
programme.desc: Two-time Oscar winner Milos Forman directs Woody Harrelson and Courtney Love in this acclaimed film about "Hustler" publisher Larry Flynt. Rating: R

programme.title: Awakenings
programme.desc: Robert De Niro and Robin Williams star in a story of the consequences of a maverick doctor's medical miracle. Rated: PG-13

programme.title: The Fisher King
programme.desc: Parry, a homeless history professor, lives in a fantasy world full of castles, Red Knights and damsels in distress. Bridges co-stars as Jack, New York's #1 shock deejay, whose off-hand arrogance triggers a tragedy which ruins his career. Rated: R

programme.title: Jackass 2.5
programme.desc: You'll laugh till it hurts as Johnny Knoxville and the guys take you behind the scenes with Jackass 2.5, talking about this excess of never-before-seen stunts in hilarious new interviews.

programme.title: Jackass 3
programme.desc: The jackass guys are back, so brace yourself for unbelievable and totally explicit stunts from the idiots you've come to know and love from a safe and sanitary distance!

programme.title: Jackass 3.5
programme.desc: The boys of Jackass are at it again with an all-new movie loaded with outrageous, idiotic stunts you shouldn't try at home. You won't want to miss this big time batch of pranks, stupidity and mayhem from your favorite jackasses.

programme.title: Jackass Presents: Bad Grandpa
programme.desc: Johnny Knoxville reprises his jackass role as 86-year-old Irving Zisman in the story of an old man saddled with the care of his grandson. The two hustle their way across America on an outrageous road trip pranking unsuspecting, real-life people.

programme.title: Shooter
programme.desc: Determined to prove his innocence in a double-cross, Bob Lee Swagger is now in a high-tension race from every law enforcement agency in the US and a shadowy organization that wants him dead.

programme.title: The Italian Job (2003)
programme.desc: The plan was flawless. The execution was perfect. Charlie Croker pulled off the crime of a lifetime. The one thing that he didn't plan on was being double-crossed.

programme.title: Snatch
programme.desc: A diamond heist gone haywire launches gangsters, bookies, and a dog on a rollicking ride through the rugged world of bare-knuckle boxing in search of the missing stone. Critically acclaimed comedy from Guy Ritchie.

programme.title: Operation Petticoat
programme.desc: A submarine captain and his supply officer are determined to get their dry-dock sub back into WWII action. However, a bevy of nurses comes aboard, causing hijinks in the hot pink sub.

programme.title: What's New Pussycat?
programme.desc: Peter Sellers, Peter O'Toole and Woody Allen star in this wacky chapter from the swinging '60s where therapy becomes hilarity

programme.title: The World of Henry Orient
programme.desc: Peter Sellers stars as a hilariously seedy concert pianist who is nearly driven mad after he becomes the obsession of two crush-crazed schoolgirls in this poignant, funny look at innocence lost. Angela Lansbury and Paula Prentiss also star.

programme.title: After The Fox
programme.desc: Pretending to be a movie director, an Italian crook known as The Fox (Peter Sellers) cons local villagers and the police into smuggling into Rome the loot from a $3 million Cairo bullion robbery...as part of the film script!

programme.title: The Pink Panther (1964)
programme.desc: In this riotously funny farce, Peter Sellers introduced the world to Jacques Clouseau, the clumsiest Inspector ever to trip over a case, who is out to stop the notorious Phantom (David Niven) from stealing the priceless Pink Panther diamond!

programme.title: A Shot in the Dark
programme.desc: Peter Sellers and Elke Sommer star in this successful sequel to The Pink Panther in which Inspector Clouseau tries to prove a beautiful parlor maid is innocent of killing her chauffer lover.

programme.title: The Return of the Pink Panther
programme.desc: The hilarious, accidentally brilliant Inspector Clouseau once again takes on his archenemy, the insane Dreyfus, as he plots to control the world.

programme.title: The Thing Called Love
programme.desc: In Nashville, there are 10,000 singer-songwriters chasing success... with one chance in a million of getting it. For Miranda "no relation to Elvis" Presley, that's one chance worth taking.

programme.title: The Phantom
programme.desc: The story begins as an expedition lands on the island of Bengalla, seeking the Skulls of Touganda. Believed to harness an energy force of power, they could spell disaster for mankind.

programme.title: Kingpin
programme.desc: A star bowler whose career was prematurely "cut off" hopes to ride a new prodigy to success and riches.

programme.title: Footloose
programme.desc: A rebellious city boy finds himself in an uptight Midwestern town where dancing and therefore all youthful joy has been banned.

programme.title: Soapdish
programme.desc: Sally Field leads an all-star cast in this side-splittingly funny look at a scandal-ridden TV soap opera.

programme.title: She's Having a Baby
programme.desc: Last year at this time, Jake and Kristi were two crazy single kids in love. Now they're two crazy married adults in transition.

programme.title: Regression
programme.desc: A detective (Ethan Hawke) and a psychoanalyst (David Thewlis) uncover evidence of a satanic cult while investigating the rape of a traumatized teen (Emma Watson).

programme.title: Mindcage
programme.desc: When a copycat murderer strikes, Detectives Jake Doyle and Mary Kelly seek help from an incarcerated serial killer named the Artist. As Mary delves deep into the Artist's twisted psyche, she and Jake get lured into a diabolical game of cat and mouse.

programme.title: Manhunter
programme.desc: An ex-FBI sleuth (William Petersen) returns to psych out a full-moon ritual killer as only he can.

programme.title: Texas Killing Fields
programme.desc: After a familiar girl goes missing, two detectives race against time before a serial killer claims her as his next victim.

programme.title: Spinning Man
programme.desc: Evan Birch is an esteemed professor at a distinguished college, where his charm and reputation have made his philosophy class very popular. When a female student named Joyce goes missing, Evan's previous dalliances make his wife question his alibi.

programme.title: Regression
programme.desc: A detective (Ethan Hawke) and a psychoanalyst (David Thewlis) uncover evidence of a satanic cult while investigating the rape of a traumatized teen (Emma Watson).

programme.title: Mindcage
programme.desc: When a copycat murderer strikes, Detectives Jake Doyle and Mary Kelly seek help from an incarcerated serial killer named the Artist. As Mary delves deep into the Artist's twisted psyche, she and Jake get lured into a diabolical game of cat and mouse.

programme.title: Manhunter
programme.desc: An ex-FBI sleuth (William Petersen) returns to psych out a full-moon ritual killer as only he can.

programme.title: Lamb
programme.desc: In rural Iceland, a childless couple discovers a strange and unnatural newborn in their sheep barn. They raise her as their own, but sinister forces are determined to return the creature to the wilderness that birthed her.

programme.title: First Cow
programme.desc: Two travelers, on the run from a band of vengeful hunters in the 1820s Northwest, dream of striking it rich—but their tenuous plan to make their fortune on the frontier comes to rely on the secret use of a landowner's prized dairy cow.

programme.title: The Black Stallion
programme.desc: Teri Garr and Mickey Rooney star in this heartWarming Adventureture about a boy who forges a special friendship with a wild stallion after both are shipwrecked on a deserted island.

programme.title: Seabiscuit
programme.desc: The true story of the undersized Depression-era racehorse whose victories lifted not only the spirits of the team behind it but also those of the nation as well.

programme.title: The Cider House Rules
programme.desc: The Oscar-winning audience favorite of a man searching for a sense of belonging. Adapted from the screen from his bestselling novel, John Irving's powerful lesson about life, love, and home earned raves from critics and moviegoers everywhere.

programme.title: The Details
programme.desc: After 10 years of marriage, Jeff and Nealy Lang (Tobey Maguire and Elizabeth Banks) have an idyllic suburban home and a relationship on the skids.

programme.title: Catch Me If You Can
programme.desc: From three-time Oscar-winning director Steven Spielberg, Catch Me If You Can follows Frank W. Abagnale, Jr. as he successfully passes himself off as a pilot, a lawyer, and a doctor - all before his 21st birthday!

programme.title: The Terminal
programme.desc: After arriving at New York's JFK airport, Viktor Navorski gets unwittingly caught in bureaucratic glitches that make it impossible for him to return to his home country or enter the U.S.

programme.title: Forrest Gump
programme.desc: Tom Hanks gives an astonishing performance as Forrest, an everyman whose simple innocence comes to embody a generation.

programme.title: Saving Private Ryan
programme.desc: A World War II captain (Tom Hanks) and his squad (Edward Burns, Tom Sizemore) risk all to locate and send home a soldier whose three brothers died in combat.

programme.title: Sleepless in Seattle
programme.desc: Tom Hanks and Meg Ryan star in an enchanting romance about a widower whose son convinces him to find new love and the woman who answers his call.

programme.title: Over the Top
programme.desc: A Championship title, a huge cash award, and his son's love -- the greatest prize of all -- are at stake when Hawk battles his strongest enemy for everything he has ever wanted.

programme.title: Night of the Comet
programme.desc: A huge comet passes near the earth, vaporizing nearly the whole planet. But a few partially exposed people are now blood-thirsty zombies, and they begin a hunt for the remaining humans.

programme.title: The Return of Swamp Thing
programme.desc: NEW HD TRANSFER. Everyone's favorite muck-encrusted plant-man falls in love with Dr. Arcane's sexy daughter and must rescue her from her father's nefarious and murderous plans.

programme.title: Popeye

programme.title: Desperately Seeking Susan
programme.desc: A bored New Jersey suburban housewife's fascination with a kooky character she's read about in the personal columns leads to her being mistaken for the woman herself.

programme.title: The Pope of Greenwich Village
programme.desc: Daryl Hannah, Mickey Rourke and Eric Roberts star in this funny, high-voltage story of two small-time thieves after a big score in New York's Little Italy.

programme.title: King of New York
programme.desc: Recently freed from prison, Frank White (Christopher Walken) begins to exterminate the drug lords who rose to power in his absence. When a group of enraged cops declares war on him, Frank's answer is to put a contract out on the cops.

programme.title: Airplane II: The Sequel
programme.desc: There’s a mad bomber on board, the first lunar shuttle is about to self-destruct, the engines are not working, and-worst of all-the flight crew discovers they are completely out of coffee!

programme.title: The Naked Gun: From the Files of Police Squad!

programme.title: The Naked Gun 2 1/2: The Smell of Fear
programme.desc: Lt. Frank Drebin (Leslie Nielsen) loves a mystery. Why are we here? Is there life after sex? Yes, Drebin tackles the big issues— and the biggest of all is how to stop devious Quentin Hapsburg’s (Robert Goulet) plan to destroy the environment!

programme.title: Naked Gun 33 1/3: The Final Insult
programme.desc: Oscar® night. Will someone please kick that numbskull off-stage? Wait! That’s no ordinary numbskull. That’s Lt. Frank Drebin, crashing the ceremonies to stop a terrorist plot!

programme.title: Airplane!
programme.desc: Voted “one of the 10 funniest movies ever made” by the American Film Institute, “Airplane!” is a masterpiece of off-the-wall comedy.

programme.title: Anchorman: The Legend of Ron Burgundy
programme.desc: Enter the world of 1970s TV news, where Ron Burgundy and his loyal Channel 4 News Team are San Diego's #1 rated news source. All is well in their male-dominated world of news until rising star reporter Veronica Corningstone turns it upside down.

programme.title: Anchorman 2: The Legend Continues
programme.desc: The wait is over, America -- Ron Burgundy is back! After losing his job, Ron reassembles the news team and squares off against a new rival in the comedy that critics are calling one of the funniest movies of the year!

programme.title: Hook
programme.desc: Superstars Robin Williams, Dustin Hoffman and Julia Roberts star in award-winning director Steve Spielberg's updating of PETER PAN.

programme.title: Titanic
programme.desc: Leonardo DiCaprio and Oscar-nominee Kate Winslet light up the screen as Jack and Rose, the young lovers who find one another on the maiden voyage of the "unsinkable" R.M.S. Titanic.

programme.title: The Aviator
programme.desc: The early years of larger-than-life American figure Howard Hughes are captured by legendary director Martin Scorsese, in this acclaimed Oscar-winning biopic starring Leonardo DiCaprio and Cate Blanchett.

programme.title: The Wolf of Wall Street
programme.desc: Sex. Money. Power. Drugs. Brace yourself for a true story from legendary filmmaker Martin Scorsese. Leonardo DiCaprio stars as a young stockbroker hungry for a life of non-stop thrills, where corruption was king and more was never enough.

programme.title: Titanic
programme.desc: Leonardo DiCaprio and Oscar-nominee Kate Winslet light up the screen as Jack and Rose, the young lovers who find one another on the maiden voyage of the "unsinkable" R.M.S. Titanic.

programme.title: The Godfather
programme.desc: A chilling portrait of the Corleone family's rise and near fall from power in America along with balancing the story of the Sicilian clan's ugly crime business in which they are engaged.

programme.title: The Godfather Part II
programme.desc: The continuing saga of a young Vito Corleone growing up in Sicily and in New York during the 1910s and then following Michael Corleone in the 1950s as he tries to expand the family business.

programme.title: Mario Puzo's The Godfather Coda: The Death of Michael Corleone
programme.desc: Director/screenwriter Francis Ford Coppola's definitive new edit and restoration of THE GODFATHER: PART III, with remastered picture and sound. Michael Corleone (Pacino) seeks to free his family from crime and find a suitable successor to his empire.

programme.title: Nightcrawler
programme.desc: A freelance cameraman (Jake Gyllenhaal) goes to increasingly greater lengths to get shots of the most-lurid and disturbing crimes on the dark streets of Los Angeles.

programme.title: Zodiac
programme.desc: Based on the Robert Graysmith books about the real life notorious Zodiac, a serial killer who terrorized San Francisco with a string of seemingly random murders during the 1960s and 1970s.

programme.title: Premonition

programme.title: Collateral

programme.title: The Babadook
programme.desc: In this terrifying thriller, a mother must protect her son from an evil, supernatural entity that has escaped the pages of a children's book and is lurking in their home.

programme.title: Gallowwalkers
programme.desc: A cursed gunman (Wesley Snipes) whose victims come back from the dead recruits a young warrior to help in the fight against a gang of zombies.

programme.title: I, Frankenstein

programme.title: I, Frankenstein
programme.desc: Frankenstein's monster becomes involved in a war between two immortal clans.

programme.desc: A charming thief and a band of unlikely adventurers undertake an epic heist to retrieve a lost relic. Still, things go dangerously awry when they run afoul of the wrong people in this hilarious and action-packed adventure.

programme.desc: The Turtles are back to battle a bigger threat alongside April O'Neil and vigilante Casey Jones. As they prepare to take on supervillain Shredder and his henchmen, Bebop and Rocksteady, they find themselves facing an even greater evil: the sinister Krang.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog

programme.desc: A charming thief and a band of unlikely adventurers undertake an epic heist to retrieve a lost relic. Still, things go dangerously awry when they run afoul of the wrong people in this hilarious and action-packed adventure.

programme.title: The Sons of Katie Elder
programme.desc: The four rowdy sons of Katie Elder return home for her funeral and to avenge her death.

programme.title: El Dorado

programme.title: Geronimo: An American Legend
programme.desc: An American legend comes to life in this epic Western starring Jason Patric, Robert Duvall, Gene Hackman and Wes Studi as Geronimo, giving a stunning performance as the fearless warrior who was the last Indian leader to surrender to the white man.

programme.title: American Outlaws

programme.title: True Grit (2010)
programme.desc: True Grit is a powerful story of vengeance and valor set in an unforgiving and unpredictable frontier where justice is simple and mercy is rare.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Kirk beams down on a diplomatic mission. He finds himself on an Enterprise where all the crew has vanished, and only a mysterious woman resides.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Kirk, McCoy, and Sulu are stranded on a barren planet where a mysterious woman attempts to kill them one at a time, while the Enterprise must travel halfway across the galaxy to rescue them.

programme.title: Naked Science

programme.title: Naked Science

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: America's First Zoo
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to the oldest zoo in the country, The Philadelphia Zoo, which boastsa reported Native American burial ground that lies beneath the grounds.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Uninvited Guests
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS has been asked to help the 1875 Inn in Tilton, New Hampshire. The Inn has had two major fires, one of which supposedly took the life of a child named Laura, who now haunts the hotel.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: A Shot in the Dark
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS visits the location of the \\"shot heard round the world\\" at the Colonial Inn in Concord, Massachusetts.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Signals From the Past
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, the TAPS team is on Rose Island to investigate their haunted lighthouse. This island housed cholera victims exiled from Newport, and many of the sick never returned to the mainland.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Lemp Mansion
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, the TAPS team is invited to Lemp Mansion in St. Louis, Missouri. There have been tragic deaths at this mansion with the patriarch and three of his children taking their own lives.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS is asked to investigate the abandoned Milton School in Alton, Ill. where some studentsare said to still be walking through the halls.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Time To Get Touched
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Ohio and to the Thurber house, the home of author James Thurber, whowrote The Night the Ghost Got In based off his paranormal experiences there.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: The Chopping Block
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS returns to Mansfield, Ohio to investigate the Bissman Building, where the current manager, Ellis Byrd, was nearly choked to death by a black mist.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: The Oldest House In Georgia
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS starts out at the Ulster County Jail in Kingston, NY, where inmates and personal have both witnessed activity.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Home Is Where the Haunt Is
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, Taps heads to Beardslee Castle in Little Falls, NY, which is a hometurned into a restaurant/ bar that has lots of interesting claims.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Empire State Haunt
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, Taps heads to Fort William Henry located in Lake George, New York, where Ghost Hunters Academy winner Adam Berry joins the team.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Sloss Furnaces
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Alabama to investigate Sloss Furnaces, a 50-acre industrial plantoperating from 1882 until the 1970s.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: TAPS Meets the Real Housewives of Atlanta
programme.desc: The Ghost Hunters enlist the help of Bravo's The Real Housewives of Atlanta as they embark on this week's investigation.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Ghosts of Christmas Past
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS gets intothe Christmas spirit at New Hampshire's Christmas Farm Inn.
